scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -e ../../packages/shared-python > /dev/null 2>&1 || true && export PYTHONPATH="$(pwd)" && uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5005 --reload
scripts.dev:worker: cd apps/worker && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -e ../../packages/shared-python > /dev/null 2>&1 || true && export PYTHONPATH="$(pwd)" && python worker.py
scripts.dev:flower: cd apps/worker && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -e ../../packages/shared-python > /dev/null 2>&1 || true && export PYTHONPATH="$(pwd)" && celery -A shared.core.celery_app flower --port=5555
